name: Pressure Cooking Chart for Fresh Vegetables
recipeIngredient: do not fill cooker over 2/3 full
recipeInstructions:
Vegetable item will be followed by amount of liquid needed, then minutes to cook at high pressure
Artichoke - 1 1/4 cups liquid - 15 minutes
Asparagus - 3/4 cup liquid - 2 to 2 1/2 minutes
Beans, green or wax - 3/4 cup liquid - 2 to 3 minutes
Beans, lima (fresh) - 3/4 cup liquid - 2 minutes
Beets, (small, whole) - 1 cup liquid - 12 minutes
Beets, (large, whole) - 1 1/2 cups liquid - 18 minutes
Broccoli - 3/4 cup liquid - 2 to 2 1/2 minutes
Brussels sprouts - 1 cup liquid - 5 minutes
Cabbage, shredded - 1 cup liquid - 2 to 3 minutes
Cabbage, wedges - 1 cup liquid - 5 to 8 minutes
Cabbage, red, shredded - 1 cup liquid - 5 minutes
Carrots, sliced - 1/2 cup liquid - 2 1/2 minutes
Carrots (small, whole) - 1/2 cup liquid - 2 1/2 minutes
Cauliflower, flowerets - 3/4 cup liquid - 2 to 3 minutes
Cauliflower, whole - 1 1/4 cups liquid - 6 to 8 minutes
Celery - 3/4 cup liquid - 3 to 5 minutes
Corn on the cob - 1 1/4 cup liquid - 5 minutes
Corn, whole kernel - 3/4 cup liquid - 3 minutes
Eggplant - 3/4 cup liquid - 3 minutes
Kale or Collard Greens - 3/4 cup liquid - 4 to 6 minutes
Okra - 3/4 cup liquid - 3 minutes
Onions, sliced - 3/4 cup liquid - 3 minutes
Onions, medium, whole - 1 cup liquid - 7 to 10 minutes
Parsnips, sliced - 3/4 cup liquid - 2 minutes
Parsnips, halves - 1 cup liquid - 2 minutes
Peas - 3/4 cup liquid - 2 to 3 minutes
Potatoes, sliced - 1 1/4 cups liquid - 2 1/2 minutes
Potatoes, medium, halved - 2 cups liquid - 8 minutes
Potatoes, medium, whole - 2 cups liquid - 12 to 15 minutes
Potatoes, Sweet or Yams; quartered - 1 1/2 cups liquid - 6 minutes
Potatoes, Sweet or Yams; halved - 1 1/2 cups liquid - 8 to 10 minutes
Rutabagas - 1 cup liquid - 5 minutes
Sauerkraut - 3/4 cup liquid - 12 minutes
Spinach, Swiss Chard & other greens - 3/4 cup liquid - 1 minute
Squash, Acorn - 1 cup liquid - 6 to 7 minutes
Squash, Hubbard - 1 cup liquid - 8 to 10 minutes
Squash, Pumpkin - 1 1/2 cups liquid - 8 to 10 minutes
Squash, Summer or zucchini - 1 cup liquid - 2 to 3 minutes
Tomatoes - 1/2 cup liquid - 2 1/2 minutes
Turnips - 1 cup liquid - 5 minutes
